positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of interconnected celestial bodies and flourishing tropical flora. The composition features elegant, swirling mandalas built from crescent moons, stylized constellations, blooming palm fronds, and geometric gold leaf patterns. The aesthetic must be luxurious, clean, and symmetrical, utilizing deep indigo blue, matte black, and metallic gold ink accents. The artwork should have a strong, graphic silhouette, optimized for high-resolution fabric printing. Intricate line work, vector graphic style, ethereal, symmetrical pattern design, centered composition.
negative: blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, artifact, low detail, jpeg artifacts, grain, oversaturated, cartoon, photograph, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy
